series_metadata.series_title: Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission Statements
series_metadata.series_description: Documents which by statute must be filed periodically with the Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: LAN: Retain until the employee separtates from the Board ; Paper: Paper: Original filed with the Joint Legislative and Ethics Commission. Retain one paper copy until scanned to LAN and LAN checked for accuracy, then destroy; however, if not scanned to LAN, retain until the employee separates from the Board, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
